name: TakeAim
desc: Gain +1 range and damage at the start of each turn. You lose this when you move.

name: TakeAim2
desc: Gain +2 range and damage at the start of each turn. You lose this when you move.

name: TowerDefense
desc: When an enemy comes within range, shoot them for 1 damage.

name: TowerDefense2
desc: When an enemy comes within range, use your basic attack on them.

name: Hunter'sBoon
desc: When you kill an enemy, gain 5 mana.

name: HuntersBoon2
desc: When you kill an enemy, restore all your mana.

name: BroodMother
desc: Your familiars and units you charm gain +2 Damage and +5 HP.

name: BroodMother2
desc: Your familiars and units you charm gain +3 Damage, +10 HP, and inflict Poison.

name: TaintedMother
desc: Your familiars and units you charm gain +4 [img:spd] and inflict Poison and Bleed.

name: TaintedMother2
desc:
Your familiars and units you charm gain +4 [img:spd] and inflict Poison and Bleed.
Start each battle with 4 fly familiars.

name: Quiver
desc: Save unused basic attacks for future turns.

name: Quiver2
desc:
Save unused basic attacks for future turns.
If you haven't attacked this battle, the number you save is doubled.

name: SplitShot
desc: Your basic attack has +1 area but deals 50% less damage.

name: SplitShot2
desc: Your basic attack has +2 area but deals 50% less damage.

name: Hazardous
desc: Tile damage and effects are doubled.

name: Hazardous2
desc:
Tile damage and effects are doubled.
Allies are immune to tile damage and effects.

name: ThornArrows
desc: Your basic attack spawns brambles.

name: ThornArrows2
desc: Your basic attack spawns brambles in an area.

name: Traps
desc:
Your basic attack spawns a bear trap if you shoot an empty tile.
Whenever one of your traps triggers, gain +2 [img:dex].

name: Traps2
desc:
Your basic attack spawns a bear trap if you shoot an empty tile.
Whenever one of your traps triggers, gain +2 [img:dex] and +1 Bonus Attack.

name: CatchProjectiles
desc: 33% chance to block enemy projectiles and a 100% chance to block allied projectiles. If you block a projectile, gain +1 Bonus Attack.

name: CatchProjectiles2
desc: 50% chance to block enemy projectiles and a 100% chance to block allied projectiles. If you block a projectile, gain +1 Bonus Attack and +1 All Stats Up.

name: TrickyTraps
desc: Damage and effects from your traps are doubled.

name: TrickyTraps2
desc:
Damage and effects from your traps are doubled.
Allies don't trigger your traps.

name: GravityFalls
desc: Your basic attack deals +1 damage for each tile you shoot beyond range 3.

name: GravityFalls2
desc:
+2 range.
Your basic attack deals +1 damage for each tile you shoot beyond range 3.

name: Bullseye
desc:
Your ranged attacks never miss.
+25% critical hit chance.

name: Bullseye2
desc:
Your ranged attacks never miss.
+25% critical hit chance.
Gain +1 [img:lck] each time you make a critical hit.

name: Spotters
desc: Your basic attack can target tiles adjacent to allies.

name: Spotters2
desc: Your basic attack and spells can target tiles adjacent to allies.

name: LuckSwing
desc: +50% critical hit chance but +25% chance to miss.

name: LuckSwing2
desc: +50% critical hit chance but +25% chance to miss.

name: Host
desc: Start each battle with 2 tiny spider familiars. A spider egg parasite is added to your inventory. You can unequip parasites freely.

name: Host2
desc: Start each battle with 2 tiny spider familiars. A spider webber parasite is added to your inventory. You can unequip parasites freely.

name: Sniper
desc: Critical hits deal +100% more damage and have a 25% chance to inflict Stun.

name: Sniper2
desc: Critical hits deal +200% more damage and have a 33% chance to inflict Stun.

name: RubberArrows
desc: Your projectiles bounce to another enemy within 3 tiles.

name: RubberArrows2
desc: Your projectiles bounce to another enemy within 4 tiles, twice!

name: TalktoAnimals
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Charm 5 the first time you use it each battle.

name: TalktoAnimals2
desc:
Your basic attack inflicts Charm 5 the first time you use it each battle.
Your basic attack has a 25% chance to inflict Charm 1.

name: AnimalControl
desc: Your basic attack causes units to immediately attack an enemy in range.

name: AnimalControl2
desc: Your basic attack causes units to immediately attack an enemy in range. Your basic attack can heal allies.

name: SleepDarts
desc: At the start of each battle, you and all allies that don't have weapons gains a temporary Sleep Dart.

name: SleepDarts2
desc: At the start of each battle, you and all allies that don't have weapons gains a temporary Sleep Dart with 2 uses.

name: Survivalist
desc:
4 healing consumables and a full water bottle are added to your inventory.
You can use consumables on allies.
Store +2 food at the end of each battle.

name: Survivalist2
desc:
4 large healing consumables are added to your inventory.
You can use consumables on allies.
Store +20 food at the end of each battle.

name: Fleabag
desc: At the end of your turn, spawn Flea familiars equal to the number of enemies you've killed this battle.

name: Fleabag2
desc: At the end of your turn, spawn Flea familiars equal to the number of enemies you've killed this battle plus two.

name: ThrilloftheHunt
desc: At the end of each battle, if you killed at least 3 enemies, gain +1 [img:dex] permanently and find a random consumable item.

name: ThrilloftheHunt2
desc: At the end of each battle, if you killed at least 3 enemies, gain +1 [img:dex] permanently and find a random consumable item. +1 Range and +1 Health Regeneration for every 5 [img:dex] you have.
